message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFDE7
  NoteBorderColor #B0B0B0
}

actor mobile as Mobile
participant "www" as WWW
participant endpoint as Endpoint
participant haproxy as HAProxy
participant ipfs as IPFS
participant postgraphile as Postgraphile
participant "CITY Custom Net" as CityNet
participant logstash as Logstash
participant dApp as DApp
database postgres as Postgres
database elastic as Elastic
participant promethues as Prometheus
participant kibana as Kibana

box "webUI" #FFFFFF
  Mobile -> WWW : sign & send events
  note over WWW
    browser ext or mobile wallet
  end note

  WWW -> Endpoint : HTTPS gateway & peer tcp/4001
  Endpoint -> IPFS : /ipfs/{CID}
  WWW -> HAProxy : HTTPS (oauth by EC Address)
  note over WWW
    User makes deposit / signs entry to trigger events.
  end note
end box

box "api - Admin/Write api" #FFFFFF
  HAProxy -> CityNet : /v2 - read/write factom api
  HAProxy -> IPFS : /ipfs/{CID} - readonly gateway
  HAProxy -> Postgraphile : /graphql - readonly graphql queries

  Postgraphile -> CityNet : Query/Sign
  CityNet -> Logstash : livefeed log
  Logstash -> Elastic : index event logs
  CityNet -> Postgres : dApp specific events
  CityNet -> DApp : sign and dispatch requests
  DApp -> CityNet : read/write signed factom entries
end box

box "dashboard" #FFFFFF
  Elastic -> Prometheus : dashboard query
  Prometheus -> Prometheus : poll()
  Prometheus -> Kibana : metrics query
  Kibana -> Elastic : dApp specific rollup

  Prometheus -> CityNet : Monitor(FA2XXXXXXXXXX) Balance changes
  Prometheus -> CityNet : HTTP GET /metrics
  Prometheus -> IPFS : HTTP GET /metrics
end box

box "dApp - controller" #FFFFFF
  DApp -> IPFS : pin entry content on IPFS
  DApp -> Logstash : dApp specific logging
  DApp -> CityNet : dispatch on-chain event
end box

@enduml
